allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Redesign UI with PodPlay brand, align calculator with simulator

Major changes:
- Replace blue theme with PodPlay grey/cream brand colors
- Use Roboto thin \(300 weight\) throughout the app
- Add BETA badges to main headers
- Change default markers from amber to green, fix triangle positioning

Calculator overhaul:
- Rename to Smart vs Naive comparison \(was PodPlay vs Traditional\)
- Recalibrate model from simulator data \(k=0.55 for ~1.9pp gap\)
- New area chart showing algorithm advantage vs locked %
- Align defaults with simulator \(6 courts, 56% util, 11% locked\)

UI polish:
- Consistent small triangle markers above slider tracks
- Update timeline/animation colors to grey palette
- Version bump to v1.2.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
